env:

1. name: Gitclaw Agent
2. 
3. on:
4.   issues:
5.     types: [opened]
6.   issue_comment:
7.     types: [created]
8. 
9. permissions:
10.   contents: write
11.   issues: write
12.   actions: write
13.   pull-requests: write
14. 
15. jobs:
16.   run-agent:
17.     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
18.     if: >
19.       (
20.         github.event_name == 'issues' &&
21.         contains(fromJSON('["OWNER","MEMBER","COLLABORATOR"]'), github.event.issue.author_association)
22.       ) ||
23.       (
24.         github.event_name == 'issue_comment' &&
25.         github.event.comment.user.login != 'github-actions[bot]' &&
26.         contains(fromJSON('["OWNER","MEMBER","COLLABORATOR"]'), github.event.comment.author_association)
27.       )

29.       - name: Checkout
30.         uses: actions/checkout@v4
31. 
32.       - name: Add eyes reaction
33.         env:
34.           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
35.         run: |
36.           ISSUE_NUMBER=$(jq -r '.issue.number' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
37.           if [ "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" = "issue_comment" ]; then
38.             COMMENT_ID=$(jq -r '.comment.id' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
39.             REACTION_ID=$(gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/comments/$COMMENT_ID/reactions" \
40.               -f content=eyes --jq '.id')
41.             printf 'reaction_target=comment\nreaction_id=%s\ncomment_id=%s\n' \
42.               "$REACTION_ID" "$COMMENT_ID" > /tmp/reaction-state.env
43.           else
44.             REACTION_ID=$(gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/$ISSUE_NUMBER/reactions" \
45.               -f content=eyes --jq '.id')
46.             printf 'reaction_target=issue\nreaction_id=%s\n' \
47.               "$REACTION_ID" > /tmp/reaction-state.env
48.           fi
49. 
50.       - name: Install Copilot CLI
51.         run: npm install -g @github/copilot
52. 
53.       - name: Run agent
54.         env:
55.           # Fine-grained PAT with "Copilot Requests" permission
56.           # https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/copilot-cli/set-up-copilot-cli/install-copilot-cli#authenticating-with-a-personal-access-token
57.           COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_PAT }}
58.           BILLING_PAT: ${{ secrets.COPILOT_PAT }}   # ← add this line
59.           COPILOT_ALLOW_ALL: "true"
60.           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
61.           AZURE_ENDPOINT: ${{ secrets.AZURE_ENDPOINT }}
62.           AZURE_APIKEY: ${{ secrets.AZURE_APIKEY }}
63.         run: |
64.           set -euo pipefail
65. 
66.           # Authenticate gh CLI with the Copilot PAT so the copilot CLI can find auth
67.           echo "$COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN" | gh auth login --with-token || true
68. 
69.           ISSUE_NUMBER=$(jq -r '.issue.number' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
70. 
71.           # Fetch issue
72.           TITLE=$(gh issue view "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --json title --jq '.title')
73.           BODY=$(gh issue view "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --json body --jq '.body')
74. 
75.           # Resolve session
76.           mkdir -p state/issues state/copilot
77.           MAPPING_FILE="state/issues/${ISSUE_NUMBER}.json"
78.           SESSION_ID=""
79.           if [ -f "$MAPPING_FILE" ]; then
80.             SESSION_ID=$(jq -r '.sessionId // empty' "$MAPPING_FILE")
81.             if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
82.               echo "Resuming session: $SESSION_ID"
83.             else
84.               echo "No session ID in mapping, starting fresh"
85.             fi
86.           else
87.             echo "No session mapping found, starting fresh"
88.           fi
89. 
90.           # Configure git
91.           git config user.name "gitclaw[bot]"
92.           git config user.email "gitclaw[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
93. 
94.           # Build prompt
95.           if [ "$GITHUB_EVENT_NAME" = "issue_comment" ]; then
96.             PROMPT=$(jq -r '.comment.body' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
97.           else
98.             PROMPT=$(printf '%s\n\n%s' "$TITLE" "$BODY")
99.           fi
100. 
101.           # Run agent
102.           touch /tmp/copilot-run-start
103.           COPILOT_ARGS=(copilot --allow-all -s -p "$PROMPT")
104.           if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
105.             COPILOT_ARGS+=(--resume "$SESSION_ID")
106.           fi
107.           AGENT_TEXT=$(GH_TOKEN=$COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN XDG_STATE_HOME=./state/copilot "${COPILOT_ARGS[@]}" 2>/tmp/copilot-stderr.txt) || true
108.           if [ -z "$AGENT_TEXT" ] && [ -s /tmp/copilot-stderr.txt ]; then
109.             echo "=== copilot CLI stderr ===" && cat /tmp/copilot-stderr.txt
110.           fi
111. 
112.           # Discover session ID for new sessions
113.           # CLI stores sessions at $XDG_STATE_HOME/.copilot/session-state/<UUID>/ (depth 3)
114.           if [ -z "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
115.             NEWEST_PATH=$(find ./state/copilot -mindepth 3 -maxdepth 3 -type d \
116.               -newer /tmp/copilot-run-start 2>/dev/null | head -1)
117.             if [ -n "$NEWEST_PATH" ]; then
118.               SESSION_ID=$(basename "$NEWEST_PATH")
119.               echo "New session ID: $SESSION_ID"
120.             else
121.               echo "Warning: could not determine session ID"
122.             fi
123.           fi
124. 
125.           # Save session mapping
126.           if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
127.             jq -n --argjson n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --arg id "$SESSION_ID" \
128.               --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \
129.               '{issueNumber: $n, sessionId: $id, updatedAt: $ts}' > "$MAPPING_FILE"
130.             echo "Saved mapping: issue #$ISSUE_NUMBER -> $SESSION_ID"
131.           fi
132. 
133.           # Commit and push
134.           git remote set-url origin "https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}.git"
135.           git add -A
136.           if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
137.             git commit -m "gitclaw: work on issue #$ISSUE_NUMBER"
138.           fi
139.           for i in 1 2 3; do
140.             if git push origin main; then break; fi
141.             echo "Push failed, rebasing and retrying ($i/3)..."
142.             git pull --rebase origin main || { git rebase --abort; break; }
143.           done
144. 
145.           # Comment on issue
146.           if [ -z "$AGENT_TEXT" ]; then
147.             AGENT_TEXT="🦃 Crunch: agent ran but returned no output. Check Actions logs for details (copilot CLI may have auth issues with the PAT)."
148.           fi
149.           printf '%s' "$AGENT_TEXT" | head -c 60000 > /tmp/agent-response.txt
150.           gh issue comment "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --body-file /tmp/agent-response.txt
151. 
152.       - name: Remove eyes reaction
153.         if: always()
154.         env:
155.           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
156.         run: |
157.           [ -f /tmp/reaction-state.env ] || exit 0
158.           # shellcheck disable=SC1091
159.           source /tmp/reaction-state.env
160.           ISSUE_NUMBER=$(jq -r '.issue.number' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
161.           if [ "$reaction_target" = "comment" ]; then
162.             gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/comments/${comment_id}/reactions/${reaction_id}" \
163.               -X DELETE || true
164.           else
165.             gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/${ISSUE_NUMBER}/reactions/${reaction_id}" \
166.               -X DELETE || true
167.           fi
168.

               SESSION_ID=$(basename "$NEWEST_PATH")
               echo "New session ID: $SESSION_ID"
             else
               echo "Warning: could not determine session ID"
             fi
           fi
 
           # Save session mapping
           if [ -n "$SESSION_ID" ]; then
             jq -n --argjson n "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --arg id "$SESSION_ID" \
               --arg ts "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" \
               '{issueNumber: $n, sessionId: $id, updatedAt: $ts}' > "$MAPPING_FILE"
             echo "Saved mapping: issue #$ISSUE_NUMBER -> $SESSION_ID"
           fi
 
           # Commit and push
           git remote set-url origin "https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}.git"
           git add -A
           if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then
             git commit -m "gitclaw: work on issue #$ISSUE_NUMBER"
           fi
           for i in 1 2 3; do
             if git push origin main; then break; fi
             echo "Push failed, rebasing and retrying ($i/3)..."
             git pull --rebase origin main || { git rebase --abort; break; }
           done
 
           # Comment on issue
           if [ -z "$AGENT_TEXT" ]; then
             AGENT_TEXT="🦃 Crunch: agent ran but returned no output. Check Actions logs for details (copilot CLI may have auth issues with the PAT)."
           fi
           printf '%s' "$AGENT_TEXT" | head -c 60000 > /tmp/agent-response.txt
           gh issue comment "$ISSUE_NUMBER" --body-file /tmp/agent-response.txt
 
       - name: Remove eyes reaction
         if: always()
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           [ -f /tmp/reaction-state.env ] || exit 0
           # shellcheck disable=SC1091
           source /tmp/reaction-state.env
           ISSUE_NUMBER=$(jq -r '.issue.number' "$GITHUB_EVENT_PATH")
           if [ "$reaction_target" = "comment" ]; then
             gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/comments/${comment_id}/reactions/${reaction_id}" \
               -X DELETE || true
           else
             gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/issues/${ISSUE_NUMBER}/reactions/${reaction_id}" \
               -X DELETE || true
           fi
